title: Campagnolo Expands its Wireless Lineup with the More Accessible Record 13
content:
The iconic Italian manufacturer brings its fully wireless, 13-speed technology to a broader audience with versatile configurations for the tarmac and the dirt.

Read the full article at Campagnolo Expands its Wireless Lineup with the More Accessible Record 13 on Velo.
author: Logan Jones-Wilkins
